buildPresets.name: x64-Windows-Debug
buildPresets.description: The standard build config for build the x64 Windows debug build
buildPresets.$comment: Since threads don't seem to be dynamically adjustable the value for jobs is set very high to ensure generally good usage of all threads on the CPU
